listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Feedback" in Game Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Information the game gives in response to player action
wrongAnswers: Guided introduction to game controls or systems
Determining when game objects touch or overlap
A rule or interaction that shapes play

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Balance" in Game Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Adjusting systems so gameplay feels fair and engaging
wrongAnswers: Observing players to evaluate and improve a game
On-screen controls and information for the player
The repeated sequence of actions that drives gameplay

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Level design" in Game Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: Creating spaces, challenges, and pacing for play
wrongAnswers: A rough version built to test an idea
The responsiveness and sensation of interacting with the game
The goal a player tries to achieve

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Progression" in Game Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: How player abilities, difficulty, or content change over time
wrongAnswers: A character controlled by the game rather than the player
How challenge changes across a game
An obstacle or difficulty for the player

listOfQuestions.question: Choose the best match for "Reward" in Game Design.
listOfQuestions.correctAnswer: A benefit given for player action or achievement
wrongAnswers: An invisible area used to detect collisions or hits
Unexpected play that arises from interacting systems
Information the game gives in response to player action
